textByHashes.f33a903270647f9d2f74ca8d43f22e477c508221: Shh shh, now is not your time to speak.
textByHashes.28ce87b1c741685aa2b74f3ea409aae98bbd0ec6: Oh Great One, do I have to have broccoli for dinner?
textByHashes.35d285985178cbe639e6b5d3ab197c572c7f09b0: I hates broccoli, why must it torture me.
textByHashes.f1c09e66ec4f81d8a0344c2c5b85f5ba121549e6: Why are they here, you didn't command it.
textByHashes.5740714dcb7971185ad9cc032344388c2fe637b0: Great round one, should I rid us of this intruder?
textByHashes.be3b6bc1e38f4236e0c830c44e8475a9317f7c4c: The Omlettesiah feels generous today, what do you want and why are you here?
textByHashes.f1472e8a02243b7cad03a0eca59f905e576509db: YOU CAME BACK? THE EGG DIDN'T COMMAND IT.
textByHashes.0a7c29a24eefd6fa35a2e286a3b5120cf297ab08: We need to punish them, but you have commanded me to wait...
textByHashes.b4effb06ae1fafd02204fcbd192083f4713389e2: Our wise ruler, the divine egg. It is our great leader.
textByHashes.5045233bb69427cc749116e514f9086359fd6d1f: It appeared to me one night when I was down by the coast, I have been its loyal servant ever since.
textByHashes.1c07be33c380231fd13dc3d05412c34605b01819: I am its voice, I give action to its words, it serves a greater good than we can understand.
textByHashes.b219d3baa108b3e694e658b2268ee68296c255e9: YOU'RE TALKING TO A POWER YOU CANNOT COMPREHEND.
textByHashes.86aa62ac874cfa2cd6a17ccc02bff43be3560366: Great round one, will Jessica Rabbit ever love me?
textByHashes.7380eec8be4a8c14a3548122eef63f4cba2b1c10: The almighty egg, will my kingdom ever fall?
textByHashes.dc841f1f02c4ade734aeb3fa3a71a59a4b38e248: My mighty yolk, do you think I'd look good in a top hat?
textByHashes.d6477676469c18e66e05b59832827a6334be3778: Oh wise one, is there a wiser ruler than I?
textByHashes.d1a4521bdf25d6b85b9ce3b7b3ec2230254dab60: Great golden one, will I gain incredible riches this year?
textByHashes.a45748b9a339f5957ec70676660d825ab4b9636e: What do they want, why can't they leave us?
textByHashes.4bb1ea6b69ab6addd2cfa6042c942485b73f619c: Don't be so foolish, of course it's real.
textByHashes.0541b049806e6380ac2ebdddcc0edb1147240c26: That doesn't make sense, if this is a fake, how did you find the original?
textByHashes.b7df0dc5ef23b188c4cdea225b7afc6cbc1fac6e: Unlikely story. Since I found it, I've been watching it like a falcon.
textByHashes.c5c2f8c5f7dd7f7521d9919680a6a50f3bed602f: Fine, but if you're trying to trick us, we'll dispose of you.
textByHashes.f0aee399cdad66c7c5c40eaa4bb7b83d0df4963c: Your magical eggness: Are you a fake version and does this coney hold the real one?
textByHashes.3c2966a2a25af4f6d1c31e55e9aefb159fe813b5: I can't believe it, how long have I been made a fool of?
textByHashes.92b527bfcc40ef2db0cff21d0378e70449f33a01: Give me the real one, we need to rid ourselves of this imposter.
textByHashes.a486d2d6680acdbce723f3036afc7a02f817eb6e: Wise one: Do I have to have broccoli with my carrots tonight?
textByHashes.9065b1430c8236be53c2f72e77373cbb8bd051d9: Yes! Just what I wanted to hear, thank you for your help.
textByHashes.a8c8d651d2d5980e7d4f4c4dcfe5dede7e937c82: I will let you ask but one question to the great supreme.
textByHashes.f719bfa97c15826a3815655669163188289bae83: Well, that settles it, I'll send the order for all rabbits to cease jumping through the portal at once.
textByHashes.7446a0fe84eaf5d63c0d2b9d81f661e4815c41de: You may leave me, keep that fake egg and dispose of it.
textByHashes.641723dc0e47869549f7254184efe770cb7444d1: I'll also let everyone know you're a good rabbit, so if they need a paw, don't hesitate to help out.
textByHashes.00a3fcb4ad7040051494eb943e972ced6cbeac5d: Leave me, I have many questions to ask the mythical one.
textByHashes.92bd1745a70c05ba019b7cd707789bef45193fbe: What are you doing?! Step away from it.
textByHashes.50166979cad153ea0af3f3a33bb8df5fbfa9a42c: None can talk to it except me!
